name: /pr-source-remove dry-run prints planned archive operations without actually moving any files
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro pr-corpus/evidence && printf 'sources: []
operator_namespace: [{id: my-src}]
' > .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml && printf 'source_id: my-src
' > pr-corpus/evidence/my-src.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-source-remove.sh" my-src --registry .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml --evidence-dir pr-corpus/evidence --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'planned: archive my-src' out.txt && [ -f pr-corpus/evidence/my-src.yaml ] && [ ! -d pr-corpus/evidence/_archived ] && echo ok 1>&2
